name_en: MiuMiu|25ss New Long Handle Waxed Leather Briefcase〰️
name_cn:
MiuMiu|25ss New Long Handle Waxed Leather Briefcase〰️
Glossy Series, More Eye-catching. Top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture with a sheen, cotton satin lining.
It feels nice to carry, huge capacity yet lightweight. Minimalist but not simple, almost every fashion blogger has one 😆
Size:34*23*12cm
Model:5BB117
